Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Bloodforged Iron body]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Soulsmith ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 16''' — The Bloodforged Iron body uses the user's spirit to accelerate the body's ability to restore and protect itself.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 16''' — Creating the Bloodforged Iron body requires being bitten by a sandviper and drinking its blood.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 16''' — The Bloodforged Iron body is something Eithan has only read about.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 18''' — The Bloodforged Iron body is used by Sandvipers to combat their own toxins.}}

== Blackflame ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 5''' — The Bloodforged Iron body calls madra from the core to heal fatigue.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 7''' — Lindon's Bloodforged Iron body requires too much madra to sustain.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 7''' — The Bloodforged Iron body is a type of body that can fuel recovery with madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 9''' — The Bloodforged Iron body is tailor-made to resist corrosive breakdown but burns through madra quickly.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 12''' — Eithan believed Lindon needed the Bloodforged Iron body to handle the Blackflame Path.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 12''' — Lindon's Bloodforged Iron body drains Blackflame madra to heal him.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 14''' — The Bloodforged Iron body leeches the user's core whenever they are wounded.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 14''' — Lindon has a Bloodforged Iron body.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 14''' — Lindon's Bloodforged body allows him to ignore the pain of a silver arrow piercing his thigh.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 15''' — Lindon's Bloodforged Iron body cannot keep up with a spear thick as his wrist.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 18''' — The Bloodforged Iron body prevented venom from crawling through Lindon's veins.}}

== Skysworn ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 6''' — The Bloodforged Iron body requires madra for restoration.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 17''' — Lindon's Bloodforged Iron body has healed him so far.}}

== Ghostwater ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 9''' — The Bloodforged Iron body was meant to protect against poison.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 9''' — Lindon's Bloodforged Iron body takes longer to heal after channeling Blackflame for too long.}}

== Underlord ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 18''' — Lindon's Bloodforged Iron body feeds on madra.}}

== Uncrowned ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 16''' — Lindon's Bloodforged Iron body runs better on pure madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 19''' — The Divine Treasure makes the madra funneled into a Bloodforged Iron body a hundred times more efficient.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 23''' — Lindon's Bloodforged Iron body runs with stolen power.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 12''' — Lindon's Bloodforged Iron body helped process blood essence and heal his wounds.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 30''' — Lindon's lost flesh was replaced by his Bloodforged Iron body.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 30''' — The hunger arm was powering Lindon's Bloodforged Iron body.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
